title: Python Fast Path
description: Trivial change (< 20 lines, single file). Lint, test, commit to main. No PR, no gates, no reviews.

tasks.title: ruff check --fix
tasks.description: Run ruff linting and auto-fix. Fix any remaining issues manually.

tasks.title: pytest
tasks.description: Run full test suite. All tests must pass.

tasks.title: Commit to main
tasks.description: Commit the change with a descriptive message and push directly to main. No PR, no branch, no review. Link to issue if applicable.
